summary: Ontology artifact approve now allows empty review note; reject/needs-changes/comment still require a reason. Proposed graph approve already allowed empty note; reject/needs-evidence remains reason-gated.
changes: server/workbench_server.py review_status skips reason requirement for approved status
web/review_workbench/screens.jsx copy/client guard updated so approve is optional and negative actions require reason
validation: API smoke: POST /api/artifacts/object%3Acountry/approve with empty body reason returns 200
API smoke: POST /api/artifacts/object%3Acountry/needs-changes with empty body reason returns 400 reason is required
